etymology.description: Ancient form of 龍(龍) (lóng, "dragon") used in Japan -> recorded in early Chinese dictionaries resembling a stylized dragon form, incorporating mythical creature imagery
etymology.interpretation: The character 竜(竜) (lóng, "dragon") is used in Japan and stylistically represents the ancient depiction of a dragon, a sacred composite creature in Chinese culture. This depiction included elements resembling snakes, crocodiles, and other animals, embodying divine and powerful symbolism.

examples.chinese: 竜(竜)在古代被认为是神圣的树(在古代被認為是神聖的樹)。
examples.pinyin: Zhú zài gǔdài bèi rènwéi shì shénshèng de shù.
examples.english: The pipal tree was considered a sacred tree in ancient times.

examples.chinese: 在热带地区(在熱帶地區)，竜(竜)常常被用作遮阳树(常常被用作遮陽樹)。
examples.pinyin: Zài rèdài dìqū, zhú chángcháng bèi yòng zuò zhēyáng shù.
examples.english: In tropical regions, the pipal tree is often used as a shade tree.

examples.chinese: 很多人认为在竜(很多人認為在竜)下冥想可以增强精神力量(下冥想可以增強精神力量)。
examples.pinyin: Hěnduō rén rènwéi zài zhú xià míngxiǎng kěyǐ zēngqiáng jīngshén lìliàng.
examples.english: Many people believe that meditating under a pipal tree can enhance spiritual strength.
